zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fairfax of Walton於1325年出生在英國越可爾沃爾頓時，他的父親Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton36歲，母親Elizabeth de Etton35歲。他於1349年之前與Ellen Roucliffe結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1386年之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fairfax of Walton于1325年出生在英国越可爾沃爾頓时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton36岁，母亲Elizabeth de Etton35岁。他于1349年之前与Ellen Roucliffe结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1386年之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Fairfax
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for someone with beautiful long hair, from Middle English fair fax ‘beautiful tresses’. This was a common descriptive phrase in Middle English: the alliterative poem Sir Gawain and the Green Knight refers to ‘fair fanning fax’ encircling the shoulders of the doughty warrior.
History: Thomas Fairfax (1693–1781), an army officer from Leeds Castle, Kent, England, first came to VA in 1735 and settled on maternal estates there as a proprietor in 1747.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fairfax of Walton was born in 1325, in Walton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton, was 36 and his mother, Elizabeth de Etton, was 35. He married Ellen Roucliffe before 1349. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1386, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fairfax of Walton est né en 1325, à Walton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d’Etton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Roucliffe avant 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1386, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fairfax of Walton 1325 in Walton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton 36 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Etton 35. Er hat vor 1349 Ellen Roucliffe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1386 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax of Walton è nato il nel 1325 nel Walton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth de Etton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Roucliffe prima del 1349. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1386, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: William Fairfax of Waltonが1325年にイギリスヨークシュアイアワルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Waltonは36歳，母Elizabeth de Ettonは35歳であった。1349年以前にEllen Roucliffeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1386年以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Fairfax of Walton(이)가 1325년 영국 요르크실르 월턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Etton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1349년 이전 Ellen Roucliffe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1386년 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Fairfax of Walton nasceu em 1325, em Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Etton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Roucliffe antes 1349. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1386, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fairfax of Walton родился в 1325 г. в местности валтон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Etton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Roucliffe перед 1349 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1386 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fairfax of Walton nació en 1325, en Walton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Fairfax II of Walton, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Etton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ellen Roucliffe antes de 1349. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1386, en su pueblo.
